articles.title: Microsoft under fire for threatening security researcher with criminal investigation - TechCrunch
articles.description: A public spat between Microsoft and an independent security researcher reopens a long-running debate over who is responsible for securing software.
articles.content: After a security researcher published a series of unpatched bugs in Microsoft products, along with code to exploit them, the company is now threatening to take legal action and call the cops on them.… [+4911 chars]
